basics.description:
**PracticePro 365 - Azure Synapse Link Infrastructure**

This deployment creates all Azure resources required for Azure Synapse Link for Dataverse, including a resource group, ADLS Gen2 storage, and a Synapse Analytics workspace.

The deployment runs under **your own identity** - no credentials are shared with PracticePro 365.

options.text: Enter a short company identifier (3-6 lowercase letters). This will be used to generate globally unique Azure resource names.

elements.name: companyId
elements.label: Company Identifier
elements.toolTip: 3 to 6 lowercase letters that identify the company. Examples: bofa, contso, frstl

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3 to 6 lowercase letters only (no numbers, spaces, or special characters).

elements.name: deployEnvironment
elements.label: Environment
elements.toolTip: Deployment environment. Leave as 'prod' unless instructed otherwise by the PracticePro 365 team.

options.text: Provide the PracticePro 365 administrator account. This account will receive the required Azure role assignments within the subscription and be set as the Synapse Workspace administrator.

elements.name: userUpn
elements.label: User Email (UPN)
elements.toolTip: The email (User Principal Name) of the PracticePro 365 admin account.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid email address (e.g., admin@contoso.com).

options.text: To find the Object ID: Open the Azure Portal → Microsoft Entra ID → Users → search for the user above → click their name → copy the 'Object ID' from the Overview page.

elements.name: userObjectId
elements.label: User Object ID
elements.toolTip: The Entra ID Object ID (GUID) of the user. Found in Entra ID → Users → user profile → Object ID.

options.text:
A SQL administrator password is required only to complete the initial Synapse workspace deployment.

After deployment, authentication is primarily handled through Microsoft Entra ID. You do not need to retain this password for day-to-day operations. If needed, the PracticePro 365 team can reset it later in Synapse workspace settings.

elements.name: sqlAdminPassword
elements.toolTip: Password for the SQL administrator account (sqladminuser).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 12-128 characters with at least one uppercase, one lowercase, one number, and one special character (!@#$%^&*).
